case_title: BARBARA WASHINGTON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-1921, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2015 - CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO MAR-16-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES SETTLED--CONTINUED DATE IS TO CONFIRM THE SETTLEMENT AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TORK CORPORATION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS (2) RODRICK FOODS AND MCDONALDS WERE NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. WAS REPRESENTED BY GRACE M. GLENN--CCSF. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICHARD JONES--V.P. OPERATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
